title: T-026 — Wiring: ATP swab auto-fail trigger (V-TEC-44) + WO close gate emit
prompt: Per §10.6 + V-TEC-44 — ATP swab `result_value > threshold_rlu` must auto-set status='fail' AND emit a `lab.fail` event consumed by 08-PRODUCTION WO close gate. Implementation lives in lib/technical/lab/atp-fail.ts as a service called from POST /lab-results (T-020) and via DB trigger backstop (so D365 inserts also catch it). Add a Postgres trigger `lab_results_atp_autofail_trigger` that runs BEFORE INSERT setting result_status when test_type='atp_swab'. Outbox event 'lab.fail' published on fail. RED tests/wiring/atp-fail.test.ts. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/wiring/atp-fail.test.ts`.

pipeline_inputs.description: DB trigger + service ensuring ATP swab fail propagates and emits outbox event.
pipeline_inputs.details: Threshold default 10 RLU pulled from reference_tables.alert_thresholds.row_key='atp_swab_rlu_max'. Outbox event payload: { item_id, work_order_id, test_code, result_value, threshold_rlu }. The 08-PRODUCTION close gate consumer is downstream — only emit here.
acceptance_criteria: Given direct INSERT into lab_results with test_type='atp_swab', value=15, threshold=10, when committed, then result_status='fail'.
Given fail row written, when outbox queue inspected, then 'lab.fail' event present with item_id and value.
Given test_type='allergen_elisa' and result_status='pass' provided, when inserted, then trigger does not modify status.
test_strategy: RED tests covering DB trigger + outbox emit.
risk_red_lines: Do not consume the event here (08-PRODUCTION side).
